name: Cameron "Cam" Davis
bio: Cameron 'Cam' Davis is a veteran clean water attorney and advocate who has served on the MWRD board since 2018. He served as President Obama's 'Great Lakes Czar' (Senior Advisor on Great Lakes at the EPA), President & CEO of the Alliance for the Great Lakes, and as an environmental professor at the University of Michigan Law School. He is running unopposed in the Democratic primary for the 2-year unexpired term seat. He earned a B.A. from Boston University (1986) and a J.D. from Chicago-Kent College of Law (1992).
prior_office: MWRD Commissioner (elected 2020; serving 2018–present via appointment or election sequence). Senior Advisor on Great Lakes, U.S. EPA (Obama Administration) — known as 'Great Lakes Czar'. President & CEO, Alliance for the Great Lakes. Environmental law professor, University of Michigan Law School.

jacket.note: Running unopposed in Dem primary; limited campaign spending expected

key_votes.bill: Long record of advocacy for Great Lakes protection and clean water policy at federal level
